Read anchors table

Source: R/data_io.R
read_anchors.Rd

Read a table of anchor individuals with known family assignments.

Usage

read_anchors(file, genotype_matrix, sep = ",")

Arguments

file

Path to a CSV/TSV file with columns: individual_id, family_id, and optionally weight.

genotype_matrix

A genotype matrix that includes anchor genotypes.

sep

Field separator (default: comma).

Value

A data.frame of class aapa_anchors with columns: individual_id, family_id, weight, and a geno attribute containing the anchor genotype sub-matrix.

See also

Other data-io: read_genotype(), read_parents(), simulate_aapa_data()
